argument: The core of the contested claim can be supported by the evidence that Juliati Alafate is named as Co-Founder & CTO of Skillset in the company launch tracker source [team-06]. While the prosecution argues that there is a lack of independent verification, this evidence does include online recognition of Alafate's title, and corroboration can be found from Alafate's background as a Computer Science PhD and Staff Research Scientist at Meta, which lends credibility to the role. Although specific regulatory filings or formal press releases may not exist, the evidence does suggest an established presence in the technology sector. I concede that there is no further verifiable documentation, but the title is currently accepted in the context presented. Therefore, while the scrutiny over the lack of formal recognition is valid, the existence of the title in the context provided cannot be entirely dismissed as unverified.
